title: Neocussonia fosbergiana
taxonomy: Neocussonia fosbergiana is a species of flowering plant in the family Euphorbiaceae, which is a large and diverse group of plants commonly known as the spurge family. The Euphorbiaceae family is a part of the larger clade of flowering plants known as the angiosperms. The angiosperms are further divided into the monophyletic group called the core eudicots, and within this group, Neocussonia fosbergiana is classified. This plant is also a member of the subfamily Acalyphoideae, which is a subfamily of the Euphorbiaceae family. The classification of Neocussonia fosbergiana reflects its evolutionary relationships with other plant species.

Additionally, Neocussonia fosbergiana is used to treat digestive issues and respiratory problems. More research is needed to fully understand the plant's medicinal properties and potential applications.
